item.title: agent_platform
item.summary: GPT-reviewed business archetype candidate; public information only.

updates.event: monday.com 使用基于置信度评分的合并策略，以缩小与完全自主之间的差距。

evidence.source_quote: the confidence-scored merge play closing the gap to full autonomy.

updates.event: monday.com 已在大规模生产环境中运行基于 Amazon Bedrock 的 AI 智能体，属于业界极少数实现该规模的工程组织之一。
updates.after_state: "few engineering organizations run agentic AI on Amazon Bedrock in production at this scale"

evidence.source_quote: few engineering organizations run them in production at the scale that monday.com does.

updates.event: monday.com 每位工程师的 PR 吞吐量增长超过五成（>50%）。

evidence.source_quote: Per-engineer PR throughput is up by more than half.

updates.event: monday.com 的 AI 智能体运行在已存在约十年的代码库之上，团队为此对代码库进行了改造。

evidence.source_quote: the retrofits that made it work in a decade-old code base

updates.event: AI Teammates 是构建在 Amazon Bedrock 上的代理式 AI（agentic AI），支持生产级代码合并等任务。
updates.after_state: "agentic AI on Amazon Bedrock with confidence-scored merge play"

evidence.source_quote: AI Teammates are agentic AI on Amazon Bedrock, and few engineering organizations run them in production at the scale that monday.com does.

updates.event: 半年前 monday.com 内部开发者每月使用 AI 编码工具的比例约为一半。

evidence.source_quote: up from roughly half a year ago.

updates.event: monday.com 内部开发者中每月使用 AI 编码工具的比例约为九成（90%），半年前约为一半。

evidence.source_quote: Nine in ten Builders use AI coding tools every month, up from roughly half a year ago.

updates.event: ARD provides domain-name based resource attribution and verification so agents can confirm authenticity of discovered resources before connecting, reducing security risk of third-party or internal service invocation.

evidence.source_quote: ARD 提供基于域名的资源归属和验证机制，使 Agent 在建立连接之前能够确认所发现资源的真实性。这一设计是为降低自主 Agent 调用第三方服务或企业内部系统时可能带来的安全风险。

updates.event: ARD introduces two core concepts: Catalog (a machine-readable ai-catalog.json under an organization's domain describing tools, APIs, Skills, and Agent Endpoints) and Registry (which aggregates Catalogs and lets agents search capabilities by intent).

evidence.source_quote: ARD 规范引入了两个核心概念：Catalog（资源目录） 和 Registry（注册中心）。组织可以在自己的域名下发布一个机器可读的 ai-catalog.json 文件，用于描述可提供的能力，例如工具、API、Skill 以及 Agent Endpoint。Registry 则负责聚合这些 Catalog，并允许 Agent 根据任务意图搜索所需能力

updates.event: Per Microsoft AI principal engineer Jennifer Marsman, ARD does not aim to build a single global unified catalog; multiple resource discovery services will exist with their own indexed resources, audiences, and ranking policies, and ARD helps AI clients discover these services but does not replace identity, authorization, governance, or organizational trust decisions.
updates.after_state: "multi-registry ecosystem; ARD does not replace identity, authorization, governance, or trust decisions"

evidence.source_quote: ARD 的目标并不是建立一个包含所有资源的全球统一目录。未来会存在许多资源发现服务，它们会根据各自索引的资源、服务对象以及排序策略提供不同的能力。ARD 可以帮助 AI 客户端发现这些能力，但它并不能替代身份认证、授权、治理，以及组织层面的信任决策。

updates.event: Early ARD-based implementations include GitHub's Agent Finder for Copilot and Hugging Face's Discover Tool, both using ARD for runtime capability discovery.
updates.after_state: "GitHub Agent Finder for Copilot; Hugging Face Discover Tool"

evidence.source_quote: 目前，已有多个基于 ARD 的早期实现。例如，GitHub 在 Copilot 中推出的 Agent Finder，以及 Hugging Face 的 Discover Tool，都已利用 ARD 实现运行时能力发现。

updates.event: PhoenixRepair 实现了比现有方法更高的故障定位准确率

evidence.source_quote: it achieves higher fault localization accuracy than existing approaches

updates.event: PhoenixRepair 采用多智能体框架，系统性探索多个候选编辑位置，并对补丁生成进行迭代反思与优化
updates.after_state: "multi-agent framework with multi-location sampling, iterative reflection and refinement, and graph-based localization for difficult tasks"

evidence.source_quote: we present PhoenixRepair, a multi-agent framework that systematically explores multiple candidate edit locations and performs iterative reflection and refinement on patch generation

updates.event: PhoenixRepair 在 MiniMax-M2.5 下达到 76.0% Pass@1 的最高解决率

evidence.source_quote: attains the highest resolved rate of 76.0\% Pass@1 under MiniMax-M2.5

updates.event: PhoenixRepair 的代码已在 GitHub 公开

evidence.source_quote: Our code is available at https://github.com/DeepSoftwareAnalytics/PhoenixRepair.

updates.event: 在 SWE-bench-Verified 上，PhoenixRepair 在 DeepSeek-V3.1 下相对 SWE-agent 取得 7.8% 的最大相对提升

evidence.source_quote: PhoenixRepair achieves the largest relative improvement of 7.8\% over SWE-agent under DeepSeek-V3.1

updates.event: 实验评测在 SWE-bench-Verified 基准上进行

evidence.source_quote: Experiments on SWE-bench-Verified demonstrate that PhoenixRepair

updates.event: PhoenixRepair 流程为多位置采样（困难任务可选引入基于图的定位信息）、迭代反思与优化生成更优补丁，并由历史尝试提炼的洞见指导终轮生成
updates.after_state: "multi-location sampling -> iterative reflection and refinement -> final-round generation guided by distilled insights"

evidence.source_quote: Our framework begins with multi-location sampling, optionally augmented with graph-based localization information for difficult tasks, followed by iterative reflection and refinement to generate better patches, culminating in final-round generation guided by distilled insights from all historical attempts.

updates.event: 现有基于智能体的方法在修复策略探索上存在两点根本性不足：对多个潜在编辑位置的探索有限，以及对每个位置修复尝试的探索也不充分
updates.after_state: "limited exploration of multiple edit locations and insufficient exploration of repair attempts per location"

evidence.source_quote: existing agent-based methods exhibit a fundamental limitation in their insufficient exploration of repair strategies. This insufficiency manifests in two key aspects. First, the exploration of multiple potential edit locations is limited. Second, the exploration of repair attempts at each location is also insufficient.

updates.event: GAIA基准上DeepDebug修复后整体准确率为63.6%。

evidence.source_quote: improving overall accuracy from 55.8 percent to 63.6 percent

updates.event: GAIA基准上三个解耦自纠错基线单次重跑修复的失败任务数为4至6个。

evidence.source_quote: compared with 4 to 6 for three decoupled self-correction baselines

updates.event: AgentDebugX将调试组织为「检测—归因—恢复—重跑」闭环，并通过Python库、CLI、Web控制台和可安装的agentic skill暴露工作流，附带可选的Error Hub用于共享脱敏失败诊断修复包。
updates.after_state: "Detect-Attribute-Recover-Rerun closed loop exposed via Python library, CLI, web console, and installable agentic skill, with opt-in Error Hub"

evidence.source_quote: AgentDebugX, an open-source debugging framework that organizes debugging as a closed loop of Detect, Attribute, Recover, and Rerun

updates.event: Who and When基准上最强单轮基线的严格归因准确率为21.7%。

evidence.source_quote: versus 21.7 percent for the strongest single-pass baseline

updates.event: DeepDebug在Who and When基准上、qwen3.5-9b骨干上取得28.8%严格智能体与步骤精确匹配率，最强单轮基线为21.7%。

evidence.source_quote: reaching 28.8 percent exact agent-and-step accuracy on qwen3.5-9b versus 21.7 percent for the strongest single-pass baseline

updates.event: 在GAIA基准上，DeepDebug单次重跑修复73个失败任务中的13个。

evidence.source_quote: DeepDebug repairs 13 of 73 failed tasks in a single rerun

updates.event: GAIA基准中被评估的失败任务总数为73个。

evidence.source_quote: 73 failed tasks

updates.event: GAIA基准上修复前整体准确率为55.8%。

evidence.source_quote: improving overall accuracy from 55.8 percent to 63.6 percent

Early ARD-based implementations include GitHub's Agent Finder for Copilot and Hugging Face's Discover Tool, both using ARD for runtime capability discovery.

PhoenixRepair 实现了比现有方法更高的故障定位准确率
现有基于智能体的方法在修复策略探索上存在两点根本性不足：对多个潜在编辑位置的探索有限，以及对每个位置修复尝试的探索也不充分

GAIA基准上三个解耦自纠错基线单次重跑修复的失败任务数为4至6个。
